narrative_text: An adventurous young otter named Ollie has just discovered a shimmering, golden treasure chest tucked away in a vibrant coral reef. He looks curious and excited as he prepares to dive down and see what's inside!
branch_summary: Dive into a sun-drenched coral reef to help Ollie the Otter uncover a sparkling underwater secret!
scene_description: A vibrant, sun-drenched underwater coral reef during midday. Rays of golden light pierce through the turquoise water, creating dancing patterns on the sandy floor. The scene is bustling with life, featuring a palette of neon pinks, deep teals, and bright yellows. The composition is a wide shot with a gentle slope of coral on the right and open water on the left.

properties.color: glossy cocoa brown with a creamy vanilla-colored chest
properties.size: medium, roughly the size of a large salmon
properties.texture: sleek, water-slicked fur that looks velvety
properties.pattern: solid with subtle light speckles around the muzzle
properties.distinctive_features: bright sea-glass green eyes and a tiny notched right ear

entities.pose: suspended mid-water, body arched in a graceful curve, paws tucked near the chest, tail trailing behind

properties.color: burnished antique gold with dark iron bands
properties.size: small, like a heavy jewelry box
properties.texture: pitted and weathered metal with encrusted salt
properties.distinctive_features: a glowing blue gemstone set into the front lock

entities.pose: sitting tilted slightly to the side, half-buried in the sand

properties.color: vibrant neon pink fading into soft peach edges
properties.size: large, reaching up like a wide hand
properties.distinctive_features: sways gently with the current despite being a static object

entities.pose: standing upright, fanned out towards the surface

properties.color: pale shimmering ivory with ripples of gold
properties.size: extra-large, covering the bottom of the frame
properties.texture: granular and soft with undulating ridges
properties.pattern: wavy lines from the water's movement

entities.pose: flat and expansive with occasional mounds

error_exclusions.reason: Only one otter is present in the scene.
The treasure chest is a static object.
